_comment: The 'update' rule is the load-bearing control that denies worker-identity direct pushes AND gh pr merge to main. Worker identity (daemon App installation) is NOT in bypass_actors; only the admin RepositoryRole bypasses. This repo uses TWO rulesets, not one, because GitHub's ruleset model applies a single bypass_actors list per ruleset; we need admin-only bypass on ~DEFAULT_BRANCH here and App-only bypass on refs/heads/feature/* in harness-feature-daemon-only. required_status_checks carries the CI gate. See https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/configuring-branches-and-merges-in-your-repository/managing-rulesets/available-rules-for-rulesets#restrict-updates
name: harness-main-no-merge

parameters._comment: required_approving_review_count: 0 is intentional. This rule exists to force the PR path so CI runs before main changes land; the operator self-merges after CI green. The load-bearing boundary is the update rule plus required_status_checks, not a second human-review gate.
